email: Hi, I was charged $49.99 twice for my subscription this month. Please refund the duplicate charge.
expected_summary: Customer was double-charged for their subscription and is requesting a refund.
notes: Clear billing complaint with a specific amount.

email: The app keeps crashing every time I try to upload a photo bigger than 5MB. This started after the last update.
expected_summary: Customer's app crashes when uploading photos over 5MB since the last update.

email: I forgot which email address I used to sign up. Can you help me find my account?
expected_summary: Customer cannot recall their signup email and needs help recovering their account.

email: Do you guys offer any discounts for college students?
expected_summary: Customer is asking whether student discounts are available.
notes: Clear general inquiry, no account/billing/technical issue.

email: I upgraded my plan last week but I'm still being billed at the old rate, and now the new features aren't showing up either.
expected_summary: Customer upgraded their plan but is still billed the old rate and missing new features.
notes: Ambiguous - touches both billing AND technical/account. Billing is the primary intent since the core complaint is being charged incorrectly.

expected_summary: Customer reports that something is not working, without further detail.
notes: Extremely short, vague email with no specifics. Tests how the model handles minimal information.

email: wow great job charging me for a service that doesnt even load half the time!! real professional guys
expected_summary: Customer is complaining sarcastically about being charged for an unreliable service.
notes: Sarcastic tone. Model needs to detect the real complaint (billing for a broken service) despite sarcasm.

email: Can i chnage my acount pasword? i dont see the option anywhre
expected_summary: Customer wants to change their account password but cannot find the option.
notes: Contains multiple typos. Tests robustness to misspellings.

email: What are your customer support hours?
expected_summary: Customer is asking about customer support availability hours.

email: My invoice shows a 'processing fee' I don't recognize and the app also logged me out randomly twice today.
expected_summary: Customer noticed an unrecognized processing fee on their invoice and experienced random logouts.
notes: Mixed billing + technical issue in one email. Billing is primary since the invoice discrepancy is the main ask.
